title: stelis siphonantha
intro: Stelis siphonantha is a type of orchid, a flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stelis siphonantha include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
